raw: This is an e-voucher . Pass is e-mailed to the patron. This pass offers up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are always admitted for free. A library pass is not a museum admission ticket. See emailed instructions for how to purchase your tickets at the discounted rate. For the most up-to-date information on museum programs and hours, please visit the museum's website.
